risk_if_not_implemented: Without Automated Training Environments, personnel may lack knowledge to recognize threats, increasing susceptibility to phishing and social engineering.

compensating_control_1.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Awareness Training
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to provide all employees and contractors appropriate security, compliance and resilience awareness education and training that is relevant for their job function.
compensating_control_1.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Awareness Training (SAT-02) provides personnel training and awareness that compensates for the absence of Automated Training Environments (BCD-03.2) by reducing human-factor risk by equipping personnel to recognize and respond to relevant threats. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Contingency Training
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to adequately train contingency personnel and applicable stakeholders in their contingency roles and responsibilities.
compensating_control_2.justification: Contingency Training (BCD-03) provides personnel training and awareness that compensates for the absence of Automated Training Environments (BCD-03.2) by reducing human-factor risk by equipping personnel to recognize and respond to relevant threats. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
